```{r library}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsignif)
library(plyr)
library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(ggExtra)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(ggforce)
library(ggeffects)
library(emmeans)
```

```{r functions}
distance <- function(x1, y1, x2, y2) {
  euclidean_distance <- sqrt((x2 - x1)^2 + (y2 - y1)^2)
  
  return(euclidean_distance)
}

correct_test <- function(x, z, object,obj_loc,trial_type) {
  if (trial_type == "retrieval") {
    obj_Names <- obj_loc$objectName
    distances <- numeric()
    object_x <- obj_loc[obj_loc$objectName == object,]$x
    object_z <- obj_loc[obj_loc$objectName == object,]$z
    object_distance <- distance(x,z,object_x,object_z)
    for (obj in obj_Names) {
      obj_x <- obj_loc[obj_loc$objectName == obj,]$x
      obj_z <- obj_loc[obj_loc$objectName == obj,]$z
      obj_distance <-distance(x,z,obj_x,obj_z)
      distances <- append(distances,obj_distance)
    }
    min_distance <- min(distances)
  
    if (object_distance == min_distance){
      test <- TRUE}
      else{
        test <- FALSE
      }
  
  
  }
  else{test <- NA}
  return(test)
  
}

calculate_TOP_in_block <- function(session,block_num,timesObjectPresented){
  if (session == "3T"){
    if ((block_num > 0) && (block_num<=2)) {
      TOP_block <- timesObjectPresented - (block_num -1)*3
    }
    else {
      TOP_block <- NA
    }
  }
  else if (session == "7T"){
    if ((block_num > 0) && (block_num<=4)) {
      TOP_block <- timesObjectPresented - (block_num -1)*3
    }
    else {
      TOP_block <- NA
    }
  }
  else {TOP_block <- NA}
  return(TOP_block)
}


```




# 🔹 Preprocessing 1 — Trial-level summarisation
```{r preprocessing_1}

filtered_3T_trial <- OLM_3T_trial_results %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Merge lookup table
  # --------------------------------------------------
  left_join(lookUpTable, by = c("subject" = "anonKey")) %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Participant filtering
  # --------------------------------------------------
  filter(Rnum %in% pp_43_list) %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Trial-level grouping
  # --------------------------------------------------
  group_by(
    Rnum, trial_num, block_num, trial_num_in_block,
    timesObjectPresented, objectName, trialType
  ) %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Summarise trial timing & behavior
  # --------------------------------------------------
  summarise(
    
    # cue & delay
    cue_onset       = start_time - runStartTime,
    cue_duration    = 2,
    delay_onset     = cue_onset + cue_duration,
    delay_duration  = delay,
    
    # search phase
    search_onset    = navStartTime - runStartTime,
    search_duration = confirmButtonTime - navStartTime,
    
    # collect phase
    collect_onset    = confirmButtonTime - runStartTime,
    collect_duration = navEndTime - confirmButtonTime,
    
    # pass-through
    runStartTime = runStartTime,
    start_time   = start_time,
    end_time     = end_time,
    
    euclidean_distance = euclideanDistance,
    warning_shown      = warningShown,
    
    start_x = start_x,
    start_z = start_z,
    end_x   = end_x,
    end_z   = end_z,
    object_x = object_x,
    object_z = object_z,
    
    # correctness
    correct = correct_test(
      end_x, end_z, objectName, obj_loc_3T, trialType
    ),
    
    # starting distance
    trial_distance = distance(start_x, start_z, object_x, object_z),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Compute block-wise TOP
  # --------------------------------------------------
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    timesObjectPresented_block =
      calculate_TOP_in_block("3T", block_num, timesObjectPresented)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```



# 🔹 Preprocessing 2 — Search-phase position extraction

```{r preprocessing_2}

OLM_3T_position_data <- OLM_3T_position_data %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Merge lookup table
  # --------------------------------------------------
  left_join(lookUpTable, by = c("subject" = "anonKey")) %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Trial-wise ordering & movement classification
  # --------------------------------------------------
  group_by(Rnum, trial) %>%
  arrange(time, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    status = case_when(
      abs(lag(pos_x, default = pos_x[1]) - pos_x) > 0.02 |
      abs(lag(pos_z, default = pos_z[1]) - pos_z) > 0.02 ~ "translation",
      abs(lag(rot_y, default = rot_y[1]) - rot_y) > 0.02 ~ "rotation",
      TRUE ~ "stationary"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  rename(trial_num = trial) %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Merge trial-level variables
  # --------------------------------------------------
  left_join(
    filtered_3T_trial %>%
      select(
        Rnum, trial_num, block_num, trial_num_in_block,
        objectName, timesObjectPresented,
        runStartTime, search_onset, collect_onset,
        collect_duration, start_x, start_z,
        object_x, object_z, euclidean_distance
      ),
    by = c("Rnum", "trial_num")
  )


# --------------------------------------------------
# Extract search phase only
# --------------------------------------------------

filtered_search_3T_position <- OLM_3T_position_data %>%
  filter(Rnum %in% pp_43_list) %>%
  arrange(Rnum, time) %>%
  filter(
    time > (runStartTime + search_onset),
    time < (runStartTime + collect_onset)
  )


# --------------------------------------------------
# Compute mean starting rotation
# --------------------------------------------------

start_rot <- filtered_search_3T_position %>%
  group_by(Rnum, trial_num) %>%
  arrange(time) %>%
  summarise(
    start_rot = rot_y[1],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(trial_num) %>%
  summarise(
    start_rot = mean(start_rot),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# write.csv(filtered_search_3T_position, "...", row.names = FALSE)
```

---

# 🔹  Step segmentation & navigation metrics

```{r navigation metrics}

# --------------------------------------------------
# Segment continuous movement epochs
# --------------------------------------------------

search_3T_status <- filtered_search_3T_position %>%
  group_by(Rnum, trial_num) %>%
  mutate(
    status_id = cumsum(status != lag(status, default = first(status)))
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(
    Rnum, block_num, trial_num,
    objectName, timesObjectPresented,
    euclidean_distance, status_id, status
  ) %>%
  arrange(time) %>%
  summarise(
    start_time  = first(time),
    end_time    = last(time),
    start_pos_x = first(pos_x),
    start_pos_z = first(pos_z),
    start_rot_y = first(rot_y),
    end_pos_x   = last(pos_x),
    end_pos_z   = last(pos_z),
    end_rot_y   = last(rot_y),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# --------------------------------------------------
# Extract translation steps
# --------------------------------------------------

search_3T_steps <- search_3T_status %>%
  filter(status == "translation") %>%
  group_by(Rnum, trial_num) %>%
  arrange(start_time) %>%
  mutate(
    steps_id    = row_number(),
    step_length = distance(
      start_pos_x, start_pos_z,
      end_pos_x,   end_pos_z
    ),
    step_angle  = (atan2(
      end_pos_z - start_pos_z,
      end_pos_x - start_pos_x
    ) + pi) * 180 / pi
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(Rnum, trial_num, steps_id)


# --------------------------------------------------
# Trial-level step metrics
# --------------------------------------------------

search_trial_steps <- search_3T_steps %>%
  group_by(Rnum, trial_num) %>%
  arrange(start_time) %>%
  summarise(
    start_step_angle = first(step_angle),
    total_path       = sum(step_length, na.rm = TRUE),
    moved_distance   = distance(
      first(start_pos_x), first(start_pos_z),
      last(end_pos_x),    last(end_pos_z)
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# --------------------------------------------------
# Merge back to trial-level data
# --------------------------------------------------

search_trial_steps <- filtered_3T_trial %>%
  left_join(search_trial_steps, by = c("Rnum", "trial_num")) %>%
  left_join(start_rot, by = "trial_num") %>%
  mutate(
    
    decreased_distance = trial_distance - euclidean_distance,
    path_efficiency    = decreased_distance / total_path,
    path_efficiency    = replace_na(path_efficiency, 0),
    start_step_angle = coalesce(start_step_angle, start_rot),
    correct_start_angle = (atan2(
      object_z - start_z,
      object_x - start_x
    ) + pi) * 180 / pi,
    
    angular_error = ifelse(
      abs(start_step_angle - correct_start_angle) < 180,
      abs(start_step_angle - correct_start_angle),
      360 - abs(start_step_angle - correct_start_angle)
    )
  )

# write.csv(search_3T_steps, "...", row.names = FALSE)
```

# 🔹  LMM-ready behavioral dataset
```{r LMM-ready behavioral dataset}

# ============================================================
# 1. Construct trial-level behavioral metrics
# ============================================================

LMM_behavior <- search_trial_steps %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Participant filtering
  # --------------------------------------------------
  filter(Rnum %in% pp_43_list) %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Rename core behavioral measures
  # --------------------------------------------------
  mutate(
    PE  = path_efficiency,      # Path Efficiency
    AE  = angular_error,        # Angular Error
    PlE = euclidean_distance,   # Placement Error
    AR  = as.numeric(correct)   # Accuracy Rate
  ) %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Within-subject standardisation
  # --------------------------------------------------
  group_by(Rnum) %>%
  mutate(
    z_PE  = as.numeric(scale(PE)),
    z_AE  = as.numeric(scale(AE)),
    z_PlE = as.numeric(scale(PlE)),
    z_AR  = as.numeric(scale(AR)),
    
    # Composite indices
    NE_z  = z_PE - z_AE,   # Navigation Efficiency
    SMA_z = z_AR - z_PlE   # Spatial Memory Precision
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Lagged learning metrics (object-wise)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  group_by(Rnum, objectName) %>%
  arrange(timesObjectPresented, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    lag_NE  = lag(NE_z),
    lag_SMA = lag(SMA_z)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  # --------------------------------------------------
  # Final variable selection
  # --------------------------------------------------
  select(
    Rnum,
    block_num,
    trial_num,
    objectName,
    timesObjectPresented,
    timesObjectPresented_block,
    
    PE, AE, PlE, AR,
    z_PE, z_AE, z_PlE, z_AR,
    
    NE_z,  lag_NE,
    SMA_z, lag_SMA
  ) %>%
  
  arrange(Rnum, trial_num)


# ============================================================
# 2. Block-level comparisons
# ============================================================

t.test(NE_z  ~ block_num, data = LMM_behavior)
t.test(SMA_z ~ block_num, data = LMM_behavior)

# write.csv(
#   LMM_behavior,
#   "/Volumes/external/Users/work/Documents/Projects/VP00157/SpatialLearning/manuscript/scripts/behavior/LMM/LMM_behavior.csv",
#   row.names = FALSE
# )
```
# 🔹 Processing 5 — statistics on navigation behavior
```{r locomotion }
# ============================================================
# 1. movement switch 
locomotion_switch <- search_3T_status %>%
  group_by(Rnum,trial_num,block_num,timesObjectPresented)%>%
  summarise(n_switch = sum(status != 'stationary'),
            switch_frequency = n_switch / sum(end_time - start_time) ,
            .groups = 'drop')

locomotion_switch_top <- locomotion_switch %>%
  group_by(Rnum,timesObjectPresented)%>%
  summarise(n_switch = mean(n_switch),
            switch_time = 1 / mean(switch_frequency),
            .groups = 'drop')

locomotion_switch_run <- locomotion_switch %>%
  group_by(Rnum,block_num)%>%
  summarise(n_switch = mean(n_switch),
            switch_time = 1 / mean(switch_frequency),
            .groups = 'drop')

locomotion_switch_summary <- locomotion_switch %>%
  group_by(Rnum)%>%
  summarise(n_switch = mean(n_switch),
            switch_time = 1 / mean(switch_frequency),
            ,groups = 'drop')

mean(locomotion_switch_summary$n_switch)
se(locomotion_switch_summary$n_switch)

mean(locomotion_switch_summary$switch_time)
se(locomotion_switch_summary$switch_time)

x <- locomotion_switch_run$n_switch[locomotion_switch_run$block_num == 1]
y <- locomotion_switch_run$n_switch[locomotion_switch_run$block_num == 2]
t.test(x,y,paired = T)

x <- locomotion_switch_run$switch_time[locomotion_switch_run$block_num == 1]
y <- locomotion_switch_run$switch_time[locomotion_switch_run$block_num == 2]
t.test(x,y,paired = T)  

write.csv(locomotion_switch_top,"/Volumes/external/Users/work/Documents/Projects/VP00157/SpatialLearning/manuscript/scripts/behavior/locomotion_switch_summary.csv",row.names = FALSE)
```
